title: Cinematic Luxury Fashion Campaign Portrait Young Male
sourceTitle: Cinematic Luxury Fashion Campaign Portrait Young Male

imagePrompts.prompt:
A cinematic luxury fashion campaign portrait of a young male model standing in a dimly lit modern interior with multiple mirror reflections around him. He wears a fitted black button-up dress shirt with sleeves rolled slightly above the wrists, top buttons open subtly, paired with tailored cream/beige high-waisted trousers. A premium wristwatch with a dark dial and metallic strap is visible on his wrist. The model has thick textured black hair, light stubble, sharp jawline, confident relaxed expression, and warm medium skin tone.

Composition is editorial magazine style, shot vertically in 4:5 ratio. The central subject is in sharp focus while several reflections and motion-blurred duplicates appear in mirrors behind and beside him, creating a moody luxury aesthetic. He leans casually against a glossy black counter with one hand in pocket and the other relaxed in foreground.

Lighting is soft, warm, cinematic tungsten ambience with deep shadows and subtle highlights on the face and clothing. Background includes elegant dark interiors, bookshelves, framed wall art, reflective mirrors, and a small warm candle lamp on the counter. Color palette consists of black, beige, bronze, warm brown, and muted gold tones.

Typography style resembles a premium fashion campaign poster with large serif title text at the top reading “TOXIC”, minimal luxury branding, clean spacing, and modern editorial layout. Mood is mysterious, sophisticated, masculine, confident, elite, and slightly melancholic.

Photography & Style Details

Editorial fashion photography

Luxury menswear campaign

Cinematic color grading

Shallow depth of field

Soft contrast with rich blacks

Mirror reflection composition

Subtle motion blur on background reflections

High-end magazine aesthetic

Premium lifestyle atmosphere

Camera Settings Style

f/1.8 aperture

ISO 400

Soft bokeh background

Medium close-up framing

Eye-level camera angle
